TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Su'aci ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Rukay 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'aluwa 30%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga Kalʉvʉnga. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga Rʉhlʉcʉ. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou **%, ħlaʔaluwa **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa kal***ŋa. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa r*ħl*ʦ~ʨ*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Su'aci ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Rukay 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'aluwa 30%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga Kalʉvʉnga. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga Rʉhlʉcʉ. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou **%, ħlaʔaluwa **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa kal***ŋa. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi ħjaʔ ɣa r*ħl*ʦ~ʨ*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
